prompts.title: Animation / Product Release Demo
prompts.description: Use this to deliver product launch animation based on real UI

prompts.title: Animation / Threejs animation
prompts.description: Three.js animation - keyframe animation, skeletal animation, morph targets, animation mixing. Use when animating objects, playing GLTF animations, creating procedural motion, or blending animations.

prompts.title: Hyper-Speed Loading State
prompts.description: Loading animation UI featuring a character-like loader with animated lines, a body made from geometric shapes, and moving horizontal lines across the background. The loader have smooth animations with multiple synchronized motion effects including rotation, translation, and opacity fades.

prompts.title: SGW - Enhanced Modal Interaction
prompts.description: Increase the height of the submit button. Make it larger and more prominent - increase the padding and font size to make it a more substantial, clickable button that stands out more in the form.

prompts.title: Force Field Background
prompts.description: An interactive, particle-based force field background effect that reacts to mouse movement. Uses p5.js to render particles based on image brightness maps, creating a fluid, magnetic visual experience.

prompts.title: Gooey Gradient Background
prompts.description: A mesmerizing, interactive gooey liquid gradient background with animated blobs and mouse-following effect. Perfect for immersive landing pages.

prompts.title: Tubes Interactive Background
prompts.description: A high-performance interactive 3D background featuring neon tubes that follow the cursor. Based on threejs-components, it includes a click interaction to randomize colors and a hero section overlay.

prompts.title: Parallax Stars Background
prompts.description: A mesmerizing space-themed background with animated parallax pixel stars and a radial gradient atmosphere. Features three layers of stars moving at different speeds to create depth.

prompts.title: Pastel Gradient Background
prompts.description: A soft, rotating pastel gradient background with blur effects and smooth animation.

prompts.title: Jelly Squish Button
prompts.description: A high-fidelity interactive 3D jelly simulation that responds to vertical dragging and mouse movement. Uses GSAP for physics-based animation and optimized image sequencing. Perfect for playful hero sections or interactive showcases.

prompts.title: Squares Background
prompts.description: An animated grid of squares background with directional movement and hover interactions. Features a customizable speed, direction, and colors with a radial vignette effect.

prompts.title: Letter Glitch Background
prompts.description: A high-end, minimalist letter glitch background effect with customizable speed, vignettes, and smooth transitions. Perfect for editorial-style hero sections or tech-focused landing pages.

prompts.title: Ballpit Background
prompts.description: A high-performance 3D physics-based background effect with interactive bouncing spheres. Features a custom shader for scattering effects, Three.js instanced rendering for performance, and responsive physics.

prompts.title: Grid Distortion Background
prompts.description: A high-performance WebGL-based grid distortion effect for background images, featuring interactive mouse-driven liquid-like ripples.

prompts.title: Interactive Waves Background
prompts.description: An interactive, wavy background effect using Perlin noise and canvas. Responds to mouse movement with fluid physics.

prompts.title: Hyperspeed Background
prompts.description: A high-performance, Three.js-based warp speed/hyperspeed background effect with customizable distortions, colors, and motion parameters. Supports multiple presets for different visual styles.

prompts.title: Faulty Terminal Background
prompts.description: A CRT/Terminal-style background with glitch effects, scanlines, and digital noise. Highly interactive with mouse movements and page load animations.

prompts.title: Prismatic Burst Background
prompts.description: A high-performance WebGL prismatic burst background effect with customizable animation types (rotate, rotate3d, hover), ray counts, and color palettes. Optimized with OGL for smooth 60fps performance.

prompts.title: Lightning Background
prompts.description: A high-performance WebGL-powered lightning/electric discharge background effect. Features adjustable hue, intensity, speed, and scale. Built with GLSL shaders for smooth atmospheric motion.

prompts.title: Plasma Background
prompts.description: A mesmerizing, high-performance plasma background effect using OGL (WebGL) with customizable color, speed, and mouse interaction.
